home.heroSubtitle: The community for people who love Île de Ré — summer and winter alike.
home.audienceSubtitle: Whether you live here year-round or visit in summer, Le Ré-seau is your space.
home.audience1Text: Find people to go surfing, cycling, or grab drinks on the beach.
home.audience2Text: Connect with families, organise outings, find a local service.
home.audience3Text: Meet your neighbours, share good tips and stay connected to the island.
home.featureCommunityDesc: Meet and connect with residents and visitors of the island.
home.featureActivitiesDesc: Suggest or join outings organised on the island.
home.featureDiscussionsDesc: Themed chat rooms and a forum to help each other and share.
home.featureJobsDesc: Find or offer a helping hand and small jobs on the island.
home.ctaFinalSubtitle: Free, no ads, made with ♥ for the island.
home.footerTagline: An independent local platform to connect residents and visitors of Île de Ré.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.publisherBody: The "Le Ré-seau" site is published on a non-commercial basis by Hector De Giorgio, Noé Derain and Tom De Freitas, private individuals, as part of a personal project.
legalNotice.hostingBody: The site is hosted by Netlify, Inc. (2325 3rd Street, Suite 296, San Francisco, California 94107, USA). The database, authentication, and file storage are provided by Supabase Inc.
legalNotice.ipBody: The overall structure, design, and code of the site are the property of their authors. Any unauthorised reproduction is prohibited. Content published by members (text, photos) remains the property of their respective authors, who grant Le Ré-seau the right to display it as part of the service's operation.
legalNotice.dataBody: The processing of your personal data is detailed in our <link>privacy policy</link>.

communityRules.title: Community Rules
communityRules.intro1: Le Ré-seau is a space of trust between residents and lovers of Île de Ré. For that to stay true, a few simple rules apply to everyone.
communityRules.intro2: This is not a romantic or adult dating app: it's a space to make new friends on the island, meet up, chat, organise and help each other out.
forbiddenItems: Harassment, insults, hateful or discriminatory remarks.
Illegal, violent, sexual content, or content involving minors.
Sharing someone's private information without their consent.
communityRules.moderationBody: You can report a post, profile, or message at any time using the 🚩 flag icon. The moderation team will review the report and take the necessary action: warning, content removal, or suspension of the account involved.
communityRules.fullRules: For the full details of the rules, see our <link>Terms of Use</link>.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using Le Ré-seau, you agree to the following rules. Our goal is to keep this community local, friendly and safe.
terms.s1Body: Le Ré-seau is not a romantic or adult dating app. It is a local community app for residents and lovers of Île de Ré, meant for making new friends, meeting up with friends, chatting, organising (activities, carpooling, small favours between neighbours) and helping each other out. Any use of the service for romantic, flirting, or sexual purposes goes against its purpose and may result in account suspension.
s2Items: You must be at least 15 years old to create an account. Below this age, French regulations require the consent of a parent or legal guardian for any processing of personal data; we do not offer this mechanism and therefore do not accept sign-ups under 15.
The information you provide must be accurate. No impersonation.
You are responsible for keeping your password confidential.
s3Items: Harassment, insults, hateful or discriminatory remarks.
Illegal, violent, sexual content, or content harmful to a minor.
Sharing someone else's personal information without their consent.
terms.s4Body: The Le Ré-seau team may remove or hide any content that violates these rules, and suspend offending accounts. You can report a post, profile, or message using the "Report" button.
terms.s5Body1: Le Ré-seau acts as a technical host for content published by its members (messages, posts, ads, activities, profiles) within the meaning of French law n° 2004-575 of 21 June 2004 for confidence in the digital economy (LCEN). We do not review user-published content in advance.
terms.s5Body2: Each user is solely responsible for the statements, images and content they publish on the platform, and for their compliance with the law. Le Ré-seau disclaims any liability for content published by its members and for the direct or indirect consequences of its use or of meetups organised through the service.
terms.s5Body3: Any unlawful content or content contrary to these terms can be reported using the "Report" button; it will be reviewed and removed promptly if necessary, in accordance with article 6-I-2 of the LCEN.
terms.s6Body: Le Ré-seau is a service in its launch phase, provided "as is". We do our best to ensure availability and security, without being able to guarantee it absolutely, and cannot be held liable for a temporary service interruption.
terms.s7Body: Some launch content may be published by the Le Ré-seau team. No fake profiles are created to give a false impression of activity.
terms.s8Body: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute regarding their interpretation or execution falls under the jurisdiction of French courts.
terms.s9Body: These terms may change over time. The version in effect is always the one displayed on this page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Le Ré-seau ("we") respects your privacy. This page explains in simple terms what data we collect, why, and how you can manage it.
dataItems: Email and password (or Google account) to create your account.
Profile information you provide: first name, age, photo, bio, status, interests, social networks.
Content you publish: messages, forum posts, ads, activities, reports.
Minimal technical data needed for the service's security (login date).
If you enable notifications, a technical subscription identifier (push subscription) allowing us to send you notifications on this device.
purposeItems: Let you access the community and interact within it (performance of the contract that binds us when you create an account).

Suggest profiles and activities matching your shared interests (hobbies, local activities), including an automatically calculated friendship compatibility score (legitimate interest: facilitating friendly meetups and mutual help between members).
Send you notifications if you've enabled them (consent, revocable at any time from your device).
Ensure the security of the service and fight abuse (reports, blocking, moderation) (legitimate interest).
privacy.retentionBody: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, your data is permanently erased, except for items we would be legally required to keep longer (for example, a report being processed).
privacy.hostingBody: The application is hosted on Netlify and uses Supabase for authentication, the database, and photo storage. No data is resold to third parties.
privacy.rightsIntro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation, you can at any time:
privacy.rightsItem1: View and edit your information from the Profile page.
privacy.rightsItem2: Permanently delete your account and all your data from the Profile page ("Delete my account" button).
privacy.rightsItem3: Request a copy of your data by email.
privacy.rightsItem4: Request complete erasure of your data by email.
privacy.rightsItem5: Object to processing based on legitimate interest, or withdraw your consent when processing depends on it (notifications).
privacy.rightsItem6: File a complaint with the CNIL (<link>www.cnil.fr</link>) if you believe your rights are not being respected.
privacy.contactBody: For any request regarding your data:
privacy.cookiesBody: We only use technical cookies necessary for authentication and the site's operation. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies.

about.title: About us
about.heroTitle: A passionate team, one island, one community
about.heroSubtitle: Le Ré-seau connects residents and visitors of Île de Ré.
about.story1: Le Ré-seau was born from a simple observation: every summer on Île de Ré, you meet dozens of amazing people without really staying in touch.
about.story2: Hector and Noé came up with a local solution to build connections. Tom then designed and built the full platform.
about.story3: No ads, no data exploitation: just a useful, local, human platform.
about.story4: Le Ré-seau is not a romantic or adult dating app. It's a space to make new friends on the island, meet up, chat, organise and help each other out.
about.missionDesc: Build social connections on the island all year round.
about.communityDesc: A local platform to meet and share.
about.privacyDesc: No ads, no reselling of data.

tom.bio: Design and development of the official platform.
